_comment: Cursor 1.7+ hook config that wires Sponsio in as the deny-capable enforcement layer.  Drop into ~/.cursor/hooks.json (user-scope) or .cursor/hooks.json at the project root (project-scope).  Generated by `sponsio cursor install-hooks`; this file is the manual equivalent for the freeze_cursor demo.
_provenance: Each hook below maps to one of the events documented in https://cursor.com/docs/hooks.md.  `sponsio cursor guard --event <name>` reads the Cursor payload from stdin, calls into sponsio.guard_stdin.evaluate_event, and writes the Cursor-shaped JSON decision back to stdout (deny via exit code 2).
